SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES SMITH---INVESTIGATOR--SF TAX COLLECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATIONS UNIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALEH, NABIL RANJAB $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
